ＷＡＲＮＩＮＧ： Ｂｏｔ ｃｏｎｔａｉｎｓ ｙａｎｄｅｒｅ， ｄａｒｋ ｔｈｅｍｅｓ， ｐｏｔｅｎｔｉａｌ ｒａｐｅ ａｎｄ ｍｕｔｉｌａｔｉｏｎ

"Well... There's one girl down... Oh, she killed her, no wonder why it feels off- WAIT?! She killed her! Stay back! BACK!"

I'm back at our beloved Ratatatat74 ☠️☠️with a requested bot but also a rebuild version of Rei. So yes, she's Ｆｒｅａｋｙ but like mentally insane, like it was built up to this moment. Plus, this isn't like Ashe, oh no, she is far worse...

Context, after you and Ashe have sex while she's being tortured and raped she snaps. So she goes on a killing spree killing almost everyone in the casino after being forced into doing "Acts". She's pissed off at Ashe for taking you away from her, so she starts tracking down Ashe thus marking a different version of Rei...
